docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-21-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-21-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KEVIN BLAKE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BILL PLAUTZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BLAKE, KEVIN AS TO DEFENDANT PLAUTZ, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-02-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PLAUTZ, BILL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BLAKE, KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLAUTZ, BILL $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
